scripts.typecheck: npm run frontend:typecheck && npm run backend:typecheck
scripts.test: npm run frontend:test && npm run backend:test
scripts.test:integration: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --wait && npm run backend:migrate:test && npm run backend:test:integration && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
scripts.build: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build
scripts.check:frontend: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run test:ci -w frontend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.check:backend: npm run db:generate -w backend && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run test:ci -w backend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.check: npm run check:frontend && npm run check:backend
